query: 那接下来 我要怎么测试 gc 在正常工作，并且明显做了选择，至少一个连续对话里，应该能够控制好 context的大小；或者换了换题之后 context应该减小； 你需要帮我设计一下案例；

t1 user: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；

t3 assistant: 不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…

transcript.content: 新的对话，也还是在umc项目里， 为什么context数据不对；
现在每一轮的context 已经能够正常gc了么

不是“每一轮都会压缩”，但现在看起来已经是“每一轮都会评估，满足条件就正常 GC 应用”。 这轮之所以没压，是因为这是新对话，抽出来的 turn 不够。代码里 `minTurns` 默认是 `3`，少于 3 就直接 `not_enough_turns`，见 [src/codex-vscode-context-minor-gc.js](/Users/redcreen/Project/unified-memory-core/src/cod…
那接下来 我要怎么测试 gc 在正常工作，并且明显做了选择，至少一个连续对话里，应该能够控制好 context的大小；或者换了换题之后 context应该减小； 你需要帮我设计一下案例；

decision.archive_summary: Active topic remains Codex VS Code context minor GC behavior in the UMC project. Prior context establishes that GC is evaluated each turn but only applied when conditions are met; in a fresh conversation there were too few extracted turns, with `minTurns` defaulting to 3, causing `not_enough_turns`. The latest user now wants concrete test scenarios to verify GC works, makes visible selection decisions, keeps continuous-topic context bounded, and shrinks context after topic switches.
decision.reasoning_summary: The latest user request directly depends on the immediately prior discussion about GC not always compressing, the `minTurns=3` threshold, and why a fresh conversation did not shrink. This is the same active topic, so `continue` applies. No earlier turn is safely evictable yet because the requested test design should still rely on that setup and constraint.
